revision.comment: とりあえず作成。
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 楢神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 】奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = 北緯34度37分24秒，東経135度49分47秒 |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} 　'''楢（なら）神社'''は、奈良県天理市楢町にある神社。 == 概要 == 　昭和30年（1955）頃まで[[吉備津彦命|五十狭芹彦命]]（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。
　[[弘化]]（こうか）5年（1848）。八代目[[市川団十郎]]が井筒を奉納した。 == 参考図書 == *『大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典』（[[平凡社]]/編、[[平凡社]]、1997年） {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} [[Category:天理市の神社]] {{shinto-stub}}

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nara Shrine'''|楢神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nara Shrine'''|楢神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nara Shrine'''|楢神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nara Shrine'''|楢神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Expand Japanese|楢神社}}

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 楢神社
| image = Nara Shrine Torii.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Nara Shrine'''|楢神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

[[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[天理市]]楢町にある神社。 == 概要 == 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで[[吉備津彦命|五十狭芹彦命]]（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 [[弘化]]（こうか）5年（1848年）、[[市川團十郎 (8代目)|八代目市川團十郎]]が井筒を奉納した。 == 参考資料 == {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher=[[平凡社]]|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] ==End Japanese==

鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[天理市]]楢町にある神社。 == 概要 == 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで[[吉備津彦命|五十狭芹彦命]]（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 [[弘化]]（こうか）5年（1848年）、[[市川團十郎 (8代目)|八代目市川團十郎]]が井筒を奉納した。 == 参考資料 == {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher=[[平凡社]]|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]]

[[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 == 概要 == 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 == 参考資料 == {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]]

{{nihongo|'''Nara Shrine'''|楢神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 楢神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 === 概要 === 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 === 参考資料 === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]]

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 楢神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 === 概要 === 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 === 参考資料 === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

== Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 楢神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 === 概要 === 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 === 参考資料 === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 === 概要 === 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 === 参考資料 === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 楢神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 === 概要 === 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 === 参考資料 === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * ならじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6150005003102 == Commons category (P373) == * Nara Shrine == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Naratsuhiko Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 楢神社 |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|楢神社]] |所在地 = 奈良県天理市楢町443　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 五十狹芹彦命
鬼子母神 |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = 五十狹芹彦命神社 |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''楢神社'''（ならじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|天理市|Q502196}}楢町にある神社。 === 概要 === 昭和30年（1955年）頃まで{{jalink|吉備津彦命|Q65318|五十狭芹彦命}}（いさせりひこのみこと）神社と称した。元は宮山（東大寺山）にあったが、氏子の集落からは離れていたので、現社地に移したという。 {{jalink|弘化|Q1325317}}（こうか）5年（1848年）、{{jalink|市川團十郎 (8代目)|Q5986169|八代目市川團十郎}}が井筒を奉納した。 === 参考資料 === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=大和・紀伊寺院神社大事典|editor=平凡社|publisher={{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

== Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

== Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]] [[Category:need translation]]

== Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]]

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]]

Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{jalink|Tenri|Q502196}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{jalink|Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{jalink|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

[[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836|1=Naratsuhiko Shrine (Q135038836)}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ならしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]]

In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:天理市の歴史]] [[Category:天理市の建築物]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]]

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836|1=Naratsuhiko Shrine (Q135038836)}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:History of Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Buildings in Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]]

Shrine|lt=Naratsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q135038836|1=Naratsuhiko Shrine (Q135038836)}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県天理市楢町443', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Nara Shrine}} [[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Buildings in Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:春日移し]][[Category:qq]]

Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Buildings in Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Kasuga-Utsushi]][[Category:qq]]

It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Buildings in Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Kasuga-Utsushi]]

[[JA:楢神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11541342}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2015年6月20日 (土) 03:48 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nara Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Nara Shrine Torii.jpg|250px|Nara Shrine]] |所在地 = 443 Narachō, Tenri City, Nara Prefecture　　　　　　　 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|37|24|N|135|49|47|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto
Kishimojin |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = Isaserihiko no Mikoto Shrine |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Nara Shrine''' (ならじんじゃ) is a shrine located in Narachō, {{ill|lt=Tenri|Q502196|WD=Q502196|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === Until around 1955 (Shōwa 30), it was called the shrine of {{ill|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|Q65318|WD=Q65318|lt=Isaserihiko no Mikoto|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}}. It was originally on Mt. Miyama (Higashi-Ōdera-yama), but is said to have been moved to the present location because it was far from the ujiko settlement. In 1848 (Kōka 5), {{ill|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|Q5986169|WD=Q5986169|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VIII}} dedicated a well curb. === References === {{Commonscat|Nara Shrine}} {{osm box|n|2463511766}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=Yamato/Kii Temples and Shrines Encyclopedia|editor=Heibonsha|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|WD=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|year=1997|isbn=4582134025}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Tenri, Nara]] [[Category:Kasuga-Utsushi]]
